profile.title: Profile
profile.termsBody: This portfolio tracking system is strictly for personal and private use. Data is stored securely and not shared with third parties.
profile.termsDisclaimer: Financial information displayed is calculated from data you provide and public sources (Banco Central do Brasil, brapi.dev, Yahoo Finance, CoinGecko). It does not constitute financial advice.

reports.title: Tax Reports
reports.disclaimerBody: Data above is calculated from recorded transactions and is intended as an aid for tax filing. Consult a tax advisor for specific situations.

login.subtitle: Track your global investments
login.forgotDesc: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
login.confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.
login.emailSent: Reset email sent. Check your inbox.
login.errEmailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Check your inbox and click the activation link.
login.errTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1body: The controller of your personal data is André Gutto (andre@andregutto.com). This system is strictly for personal and private use.
privacy.s2body: We collect: email address (for authentication), first and last name (provided voluntarily), country of residence, and personal financial data entered by you (assets, contributions, transactions). No data is obtained from third parties without your consent.
privacy.s3body: Your data is processed exclusively to operate the portfolio tracker. Legal basis: consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) for optional profile data; legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR) for data required for the service to function.
privacy.s4body: Your data is kept as long as your account is active. Upon requesting account deletion, all personal data will be erased within 30 days.
privacy.s5body: Your data is not sold, rented, or shared with third parties. The service uses the Supabase platform (infrastructure hosted in the European Union) for secure storage.
privacy.s6body: You have the right to: access your personal data; rectify it; request erasure ("right to be forgotten"); restrict processing; obtain data portability; object to processing. To exercise these rights, please contact us at the email address below.
privacy.s7body: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. All data is transmitted via HTTPS.
privacy.s8body: If you reside in France, you have the right to file a complaint with the CNIL (Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés) at cnil.fr if you believe your personal data is not being processed in accordance with the GDPR.
privacy.s9body: For any questions regarding this policy or the processing of your data, please contact: andre@andregutto.com

termsPage.title: Terms of Use
termsPage.s1body: Portfolio Tracker (portfolio.andregutto.com) is a personal investment tracking tool provided by André Gutto free of charge for private use.
termsPage.s2body: The service is intended exclusively for the personal use of the account holder. Use for commercial purposes, redistribution, or sharing of access credentials is prohibited.
termsPage.s3body: You are responsible for the accuracy of the data you enter. Information displayed is calculated from data you provide and public sources. It does not constitute financial, tax, or legal advice.
termsPage.s4body: The service is provided without guarantee of continuous availability. Interruptions may occur for maintenance or technical reasons.
termsPage.s5body: All elements of the system (code, design, text) are the property of André Gutto unless otherwise indicated. No part may be reproduced without authorization.
termsPage.s6body: The service provider is not liable for investment decisions made based on the information displayed. Use of the system is at the user's own risk.
termsPage.s7body: These terms may be updated periodically. The date of the last update is indicated at the top of this page.
termsPage.s8body: These terms are governed by French law (loi n° 2004-575 du 21 juin 2004 for confidence in the digital economy) and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
termsPage.s9body: For any questions, please contact: andre@andregutto.com

onboarding.welcomeBody: Track all your investments in one place: stocks, REITs, crypto, fixed income and real estate. Let's set up your account in 3 steps.
onboarding.classesBody: We created the most common classes for you. You can edit colors, names and add new ones in the Classes tab at any time.
onboarding.classesNote: Classes help you organize and visualize your portfolio allocation.
onboarding.assetsBody: What type of asset do you want to register first? Click to open the form.
onboarding.assetImovelDesc: Register the property and log rental income as monthly earnings
onboarding.doneBody: Your portfolio is configured. Add assets and contributions from the Contributions tab at any time.

finances.freedomSubtitle: Simulate your trajectory and discover when you will reach financial independence
finances.configureIncome: Set your monthly income to get started
finances.configureHint: Go to Planning to set your income and envelopes
finances.noAccountBanner: Create an account to organise your transactions by source.
finances.noTransactionsHint: Import a CSV statement or add manually
finances.csvParsingHint: Detecting columns and applying keyword rules
finances.csvApplyAllConfirm: Apply this category to all {n} occurrences of "{desc}"?
finances.csvSameDescConfirm: {n} other transaction(s) with the description "{desc}". Change all?
finances.csvAiNoMatch: AI ran but found no categories for {n} items
finances.overviewFreedomPlan: Set up your Financial Freedom plan
finances.freedomRateHint: Expected average monthly portfolio growth. Includes yield, dividends and appreciation.
finances.freedomIncomeRateHint: % of portfolio to withdraw monthly once the goal is reached — without touching the principal. E.g. 0.50% on €1M = €5,000/month.
finances.freedomEmptyBody: Set your initial capital, monthly contribution, return rate and target to visualise your trajectory.
finances.freedomDesiredIncomeHint: How much you want to receive per month in today's money. Inflation will be applied to compute the future required capital.
finances.freedomApprox: Historical BRL values converted at current rate.
finances.freedomCapitalNominalHint: Nominal value — not inflation-adjusted. The passive income this capital generates will also be nominal.
finances.momentsSubtitle: Group expenses from trips, parties and special events
finances.momentEmptyBody: Create a Moment to group all expenses from a trip, party or special event.
finances.momentConfirmDelete: Delete this Moment? Transactions will be unlinked but not deleted.
finances.shareHideDescSub: Shows only categories and totals, without merchant names
finances.shareRevokeConfirm: Revoke link? Anyone with the old link will no longer be able to access it.
finances.publicExpiredBody: The Moment owner can generate a new link.
finances.publicNotFoundBody: The link may have been revoked.
finances.accountsPageSubtitle: Manage your bank and investment accounts
finances.accountEmptyBody: Add an account to track your balance and link transactions.
finances.accountFromPortfolioSub: Institutions in your portfolio without a finance account
finances.accountDeleteConfirm: Delete this account? Linked transactions will be unlinked but not deleted.
finances.banksSubtitle: Connect your European banks to automatically import transactions
finances.banksEmptyBody: Connect your Revolut or another European bank account to automatically import transactions.
finances.bankConnectionsBody: Connect a bank to automatically import transactions
finances.connectedSuccess: Account connected! Click Sync to import transactions.
